calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-09-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Michael Sherwood Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff
Lenn Cameron, Agent for Plaintiff, Gracie Chin
Jack Ramon, Defendant in propria persona

Court reporter not present. Settlement conference held. Both parties represented that a settlement has been reached. The Court asked the parties if they reached a settlement and questioned the parties as to the terms. Based on their representation, the following settlement was articulated as follows:

Defendant will pay $1,100 by 1/12/04 to Plaintiff. Thereafter, defendant will make monthly payments of $189.58 per month until balance is paid off.

Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Court Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott
